explanation:
Rewrite as \int \left(1 - \frac{x + 1}{x(x^2 + 1)}\right) dx.
Partial fractions: \frac{x + 1}{x(x^2 + 1)} = \frac{1}{x} + \frac{-x + 1}{x^2 + 1}.
Integrate to get x - \log |x| + \frac{1}{2} \log (x^2 + 1) - \tan^{-1} x + c.
name: Question Item 1

text: If f(x) is a polynomial of the second degree in x such that f(0) = f(1) = 3, f(2) = -3. Then \int \frac{f(x)}{x^3 - 1} dx =
explanation:
f(x) = x^2 - x - 3.
\int \frac{x^2 - x - 3}{x^3 - 1} dx.
Partial fractions: \frac{-1}{x - 1} + \frac{2x + 2}{x^2 + x + 1}.
Integrate to get \log \left( \frac{x^2 + x + 1}{|x - 1|} \right) + \frac{2}{\sqrt{3}} \tan^{-1} \left( \frac{2x + 1}{\sqrt{3}} \right) + c.
name: Question Item 2

explanation: \int e^x dx = e^x + c.
name: Question Item 3

explanation:
\int \frac{2 \tan x}{1 + 2 \tan^2 x} dx = \int \frac{2 \sin x \cos x}{\cos^2 x + 2 \sin^2 x} dx.
Substitute t = 1 + \sin^2 x to get \log |2 \sin^2 x + \cos^2 x| + c.
name: Question Item 4

explanation:
\int \sin^3 x \cos^3 x dx = \int \sin^3 x \cos x (1 - \sin^2 x) dx.
Substitute t = \sin x: \int (t^3 - t^5) dt = \frac{t^4}{4} - \frac{t^6}{6} + c = \frac{\sin^4 x}{4} - \frac{\sin^6 x}{6} + c.
name: Question Item 5

explanation:
\frac{\cos 13x - \cos 14x}{1 + 2 \cos 9x} = \cos 4x - \cos 5x.
Integrate: \frac{\sin 4x}{4} - \frac{\sin 5x}{5} + c. So a=4, b=5, a^b=4^5.
name: Question Item 7

text: Solve I_n + n I_{n-1}, if I_n = \int (\ln x)^n dx
explanation: Integration by parts: I_n = x (\ln x)^n - n I_{n-1} + k \implies I_n + n I_{n-1} = x (\ln x)^n + k.
name: Question Item 8

explanation:
\int \frac{\cos^3 x}{\sin^2 x + \sin x} dx = \int \frac{(1 - \sin^2 x) \cos x}{\sin^2 x + \sin x} dx.
Substitute t = \sin x: \int \frac{1 - t^2}{t^2 + t} dt = \int (1 - t) dt = t - t^2 + c = \sin x - \sin^2 x + c = \log |\sin x| - \sin x + c.
name: Question Item 9

explanation: Substitute \log x = t: \int e^t \left( \log t + \frac{1}{t^2} \right) dt = e^t \log t - \frac{e^t}{t} + c = x \left[ \log(\log x) - \frac{1}{\log x} \right] + c.
name: Question Item 10

explanation: Substitute \frac{x-1}{x+1} = t^2: leads to \ln |x + \sqrt{x^2 - 1}| - \sec^{-1}(x) + c.
name: Question Item 11

explanation: Substitute xe^x = t: \int \frac{dt}{\cot t} = \int \tan t dt = \log |\sec t| + c = \log |\sec (xe^x)| + c.
name: Question Item 12

explanation: Substitute 3^x = t: \frac{1}{\log 3} \int \frac{dt}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}} = \frac{1}{\log 3} \sin^{-1} t + c = \sin^{-1}(3^x) \cdot (\log 3)^{-1} + c.
name: Question Item 13

explanation: Substitute x^n = t: \frac{1}{n} \int \frac{dt}{t^2 + 4} = \frac{1}{n} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \tan^{-1} \left( \frac{t}{2} \right) + c = \frac{1}{2n} \tan^{-1} \left( \frac{x^n}{2} \right) + c.
name: Question Item 14

explanation: \int \frac{\sec^2 x}{1 - \tan^2 x} dx = \frac{1}{2} \log |\sec 2x + \tan 2x| + c = \frac{1}{2} \log \left| \frac{1 + \tan x}{1 - \tan x} \right| + c.
name: Question Item 15

explanation:
\frac{(x+1)^2}{x(x^2+1)} = \frac{1}{x} + \frac{1 - x}{x^2 + 1}.
Integrate: \log |x| + \tan^{-1} x + \frac{1}{2} \log (x^2 + 1) + c.
name: Question Item 16

explanation:
\frac{\cos 13x - \cos 14x}{1 + 2 \cos 9x} = \cos 4x - \cos 5x.
Integrate: \frac{\sin 4x}{4} - \frac{\sin 5x}{5} + c. So a=4, b=5, a^b=4^5.
name: Question Item 17

explanation: \int x (\sec^2 x - 1) dx = x \tan x - x^2 - \int \tan x dx + \frac{x^2}{2} + c = x \tan x - \log |\sec x| - \frac{x^2}{2} + c.
name: Question Item 18

explanation: \int \frac{e^x}{1 + e^x} dx. Substitute 1 + e^x = t: \log |1 + e^x| + c.
name: Question Item 20

explanation: \sqrt{1 + \sin 2x} = |\sin x + \cos x|. Integrate piecewise: \sin x - \cos x or \cos x - \sin x + c.
name: Question Item 21

explanation: \int \frac{\sin 2x}{1 + \cos^2 x} dx. Substitute t = 1 + \cos^2 x: -\log |1 + \cos^2 x| + c.
name: Question Item 22

explanation:
\frac{(x+1)^2}{x(x^2+1)} = \frac{1}{x} + \frac{1 - x}{x^2 + 1}.
Integrate: \log |x| + \tan^{-1} x + \frac{1}{2} \log (x^2 + 1) + c.
name: Question Item 23

explanation: Partial fractions and integration yield \log |x + \sqrt{x^2 - 1}| - \sec^{-1}(x) + c.
name: Question Item 24

explanation:
\frac{\cos 13x - \cos 14x}{1 + 2 \cos 9x} = \cos 4x - \cos 5x.
Integrate: \frac{\sin 4x}{4} - \frac{\sin 5x}{5} + c. So a=4, b=5, a^b=4^5.
name: Question Item 25

explanation: \int x (\sec^2 x - 1) dx = x \tan x - x^2 - \int \tan x dx + \frac{x^2}{2} + c = x \tan x - \log |\sec x| - \frac{x^2}{2} + c.
name: Question Item 26

explanation: \int \frac{e^x}{1 + e^x} dx. Substitute 1 + e^x = t: \log |1 + e^x| + c.
name: Question Item 28

explanation: \sqrt{1 + \sin 2x} = |\sin x + \cos x|. Integrate piecewise: \sin x - \cos x or \cos x - \sin x + c.
name: Question Item 29

explanation: \int \frac{\sin 2x}{1 + \cos^2 x} dx. Substitute t = 1 + \cos^2 x: -\log |1 + \cos^2 x| + c.
name: Question Item 30

explanation:
\frac{(x+1)^2}{x(x^2+1)} = \frac{1}{x} + \frac{1 - x}{x^2 + 1}.
Integrate: \log |x| + \tan^{-1} x + \frac{1}{2} \log (x^2 + 1) + c.
name: Question Item 31

explanation: Partial fractions and integration yield \log |x + \sqrt{x^2 - 1}| - \sec^{-1}(x) + c.
name: Question Item 32

explanation: Substitute 3^x = t: \frac{1}{\log 3} \int \frac{dt}{\sqrt{1 - t^2}} = \frac{1}{\log 3} \sin^{-1} t + c = \sin^{-1}(3^x) \cdot (\log 3)^{-1} + c.
name: Question Item 33

explanation: Substitute x^n = t: \frac{1}{n} \int \frac{dt}{t^2 + 4} = \frac{1}{n} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \tan^{-1} \left( \frac{t}{2} \right) + c = \frac{1}{2n} \tan^{-1} \left( \frac{x^n}{2} \right) + c.
name: Question Item 34

explanation: \int \frac{\sec^2 x}{1 - \tan^2 x} dx = \frac{1}{2} \log |\sec 2x + \tan 2x| + c = \frac{1}{2} \log \left| \frac{1 + \tan x}{1 - \tan x} \right| + c.
name: Question Item 35

explanation:
